name: a-matter-of-death-and-life
description: Irvin D. Yalom & Marilyn Yalom's A Matter of Death and Life — an existential toolkit for facing mortality, supporting a loved one through terminal illness, and navigating grief after profound loss.
useCase: Confronting death anxiety, supporting a terminally ill loved one, achieving regret-free living, making end-of-life decisions, navigating grief after bereavement, and applying existential psychotherapy to death and dying.
knownRisks: This skill deals with terminal illness, suicide, and grief — sensitive topics that require care and empathy
Do not give medical advice for assisted suicide — refer users to their doctors and local laws
The book reflects a secular, non-religious perspective on death — respect users with different spiritual frameworks
